name: Satellite/Map Data Visualization
description: Google Earth style topographic mapping and satellite imagery. Aerial perspective with information overlays, flat design aesthetic, data-visualization focused.

visual_attributes.texture: Flat design, topographic contours, minimal depth

image_gen_workflow.prompt_template: Satellite map view of [location], Google Earth style topographic visualization, aerial perspective, geographic data visualization, flat design aesthetic, clean overlays, professional map design

video_gen_workflow.motion_prompt_template: smooth zoom in/out on satellite map, aerial camera movement, topographic visualization, flat design data overlay animation

remotion_role: All text labels, measurements, data overlays, icons - never background imagery
